title: Albashi
name: Suna
invalidRows: Layukan da Ba Su da Inganci
fileMustContain: Fayil dole ya ƙunshi aƙalla layi na kanun ginshiƙai ɗaya da layi na bayanai ɗaya
uploadValidFile: Da fatan za ka lodawa fayil mai inganci na CSV ko Excel
uploadCsvFiles: Loda fayilolin CSV don aiwatar biyaɗen ma'aikata yawan
uploadCsvOrExcel: Loda fayil na CSV ko Excel wanda ke ƙunshe da bayanan ma'aikaci da adadin biya
clickToUpload: Danna don lodawa ko ja da sauke
requirementsDescription: Zazzage tsari ko tabbata cewa takardarka tana amfani da ainihin sunayen kanun ginshiƙai masu zuwa. Muna ƙirƙirar nassoshi kai tsaye don kowane ma'aikaci don guje wa kwafi.
requirementsRequired: Ana buƙata (dace da girman kanun ginshiƙai daidai): firstName, lastName, position, amount, email, phone, paymentChannel, currency, accountName.
requirementsOptional: Kanun ginshiƙai na zaɓi: network, momoNumber, bankName, bankAccountNo, bankBranch. Ka yi amfani da su lokacin da paymentChannel yake MOMO ko BANK bi da bi.
requirementsNotes: Shawarwari: • paymentChannel yana karɓar MOMO ko BANK. • Don MOMO haɗa da hanyar sadarwa (MTN ko TELECEL) da momoNumber. • Don BANK haɗa da bankName, bankAccountNo da bankBranch. • amount dole ya zama lambobi kawai (babu alamomin kudi).
fileUploadedParsed: An lodawa fayil kuma an fassara shi cikin nasara! Ma'aikata {{count}} a shirye don biya.
pleaseUploadFile: Da fatan za ka lodawa fayil da farko
payrollProcessedSuccess: An aiwatar albashi cikin nasara! Ma'aikata {{count}} an biya su jimla na GH₵{{amount}}
csvTemplateDownloaded: An zazzage tsari na CSV cikin nasara!
addEmployeeFeatureComing: Fasalin Ƙara Ma'aikaci yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba!
payrollProcessedAllEmployees: An aiwatar albashi cikin nasara ga duk ma'aikata!

validationErrors.amountRequired: Ana buƙatar adadin inganci (dole ya zama fiye da 0)
validationErrors.emailInvalid: Imel dole ya zama adireshin imel mai inganci
validationErrors.phoneInvalid: Lambar waya dole ta zama inganci (aƙalla lambobi 7)
